message:
test(grp_abi): add strict/hardened mode NSS fixture tests (bd-x2sq)

Add 8 tests covering FRANKENLIBC_MODE=strict and FRANKENLIBC_MODE=hardened
behavior for group lookups:

- strict_mode_getgrnam_returns_null_for_invalid
- strict_mode_getgrgid_returns_null_for_invalid_gid
- hardened_mode_getgrnam_returns_null_for_invalid
- hardened_mode_getgrgid_returns_null_for_invalid_gid
- strict_mode_getgrnam_null_input_returns_null
- hardened_mode_getgrnam_null_input_returns_null
- strict_mode_grent_iteration_works
- hardened_mode_grent_iteration_works

Completes NSS fixture/e2e closure for group ABI (companion to pwd_abi tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
